widgets.title: Units Sold by Category
queries: SELECT CATEGORY AS category, SUM(UNITS_SOLD) AS total_units_sold FROM PRODUCTS GROUP BY CATEGORY ORDER BY total_units_sold DESC

widgets.title: Revenue and Salary by Region and Department
queries: SELECT REGION AS category, SUM(REVENUE) AS total_revenue FROM SALES GROUP BY REGION ORDER BY REGION
SELECT DEPARTMENT AS category, AVG(SALARY) AS average_salary FROM EMPLOYEES GROUP BY DEPARTMENT ORDER BY DEPARTMENT
widgets.configuration: {"chart":{"styledMode":false,"type":"bar"},"credits":{"enabled":false},"exporting":{"enabled":false},"legend":{"enabled":true},"plotOptions":{},"title":{"text":"Revenue by Region and Average Salary by Department"},"xAxis":{"axisIndex":0,"title":{"text":"Region / Department"}},"yAxis":{"axisIndex":0,"title":{"text":"Amount"}}}

widgets.title: Random Range Area Chart
queries: SELECT 1 AS _x, 10 AS _low, 20 AS _high UNION ALL SELECT 2, 15, 25 UNION ALL SELECT 3, 12, 30 UNION ALL SELECT 4, 18, 28 UNION ALL SELECT 5, 14, 22
